decisions.decision: Used status 'Complete' (not 'Satisfied') for the 11 HXP-TOOL/LOCO rows in REQUIREMENTS.md traceability table
decisions.rationale: phase.complete writes 'Complete' and it matches the term used elsewhere in that table (e.g. CFG-04 | Phase 24 | Complete).

decisions.decision: Left the merged worktree branch's worktree directory in place when 'git worktree remove --force' failed on the harness lock
decisions.rationale: Lock holder is the live Claude Code process (pid); the harness GCs agent worktrees on session exit; the SUMMARY.md and all commits were already merged to develop, so nothing is at risk. Did not fight the harness lock.
